title: Hermes Agent is crazy… 180,000+ github stars
summary: Hermes Agent is an agent framework with over 180,000 GitHub stars. The video demonstrates running it with MiniMax's m3 model to reduce costs by approximately 100x compared to alternatives.
writeup: The video covers Hermes Agent, a GitHub project with over 180,000 stars, and demonstrates running it with MiniMax's m3 model. The focus is cost-effective deployment: the pairing is presented as reducing inference costs by 100x relative to alternatives. Concepts touched include multi-agent systems and token optimization for cost reduction.
